Uses of Class
jline.lang.nodes.StatefulNode

  • Packages that use StatefulNode 
    Package Description
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.nodes
    This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
    jline.lang.state
    Classes that model the state of a network and its individual nodes

    • Uses of StatefulNode in jline.lang

      Fields in jline.lang with type parameters of type StatefulNode 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      Map<StatefulNode,​Matrix> NetworkStruct.state  
      List<StatefulNode> NetworkStruct.stateful  
      Map<StatefulNode,​Matrix> NetworkStruct.stateprior  

    • Uses of StatefulNode in jline.lang.nodes

      Subclasses of StatefulNode in jline.lang.nodes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  Cache
      A class switch node based on cache hits or misses
      class  Delay
      An infinite server station, i.e.
      class  Join
      A node that reassembles a set of sibling tasks into the original parent job
      class  Place
      Place as in a stochastic Petri net model
      class  Queue
      A queueing station within a Network model
      class  Source
      An abstraction of the external world jobs in open classes come from
      class  Station
      A node where jobs can spend time stationing there
